title: MSME Members Meets SEC Management
description: MSME,  21,22,  L-R,  Director, Office of the Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Daiyabu Kurfi, Director General SEC Mr Lamido Yuguda,  President, Micro, Small and Medium Enterprise
html: MSME,  21,22,  L-R,  Director, Office of the Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Daiyabu Kurfi, Director General SEC Mr Lamido Yuguda,  President, Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Business Membership Organisations in Nigeria, MSME Forum Alh Garba Ibrahim Gusau and  Assistant Director, Financial Inclusion SEC Mrs Sa’adatu Faruk during a Meeting between The SEC and MSME Forum in Abuja.
